excerpt: After their last male general falls in battle, the surviving women of a family devoted to defending the Song Empire raise an army and set out to battle the invading forces.
title: The 14 Amazons

excerpt: A mutant killer snowman terrorizes people on a tropical resort.
title: Jack Frost 2: Revenge of the Mutant Killer Snowman

excerpt: A young model’s obsession with a dark-web murder trial threatens her sanity.
title: Red Rooms

excerpt: A repressed middle-aged piano teacher at an elite Vienna conservatory enters into a destructive affair with a wealthy and talented young student.
title: The Piano Teacher

excerpt: A cyborg from the future protects a young boy crucial to humanity’s survival from a merciless robot made of liquid metal that can assume the form of anything it touches.
title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
